about.title: About
about.subtitle: I'm Fabian Seitz
about.text1: As an IT Administrator and Developer with extensive experience in Microsoft Administration, SAP Basis and Automation, I develop innovative solutions for complex IT challenges.
about.text2: My expertise includes developing Identity Management systems that seamlessly connect HR data (SAP R3 HCM) with IT infrastructure (Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID). With my project faneX-ID, I developed the idea and complete concept for a central platform that automatically manages the entire Employee Lifecycle. The idea and architecture are 100% mine, while the technical implementation is done in a team.
about.text3: In addition to my professional work, I passionately develop Home Assistant integrations and add-ons that extend and automate smart home systems. My projects range from PowerShell automation scripts to Python-based system integrations to modern web applications. The complete concepts and architectures for projects with React and FastAPI are 100% mine, while the technical implementation is mainly done in teams.
about.text4: Additionally, I am engaged as an IT trainer and lecturer at the Adult Education Center (VHS), where I share my knowledge in IT topics and programming with interested learners. This activity allows me to convey complex technical concepts in an understandable way while continuously learning myself.
about.text5: My commitment extends beyond professional work: I have volunteered for several years at the youth center in my community, where I supported and promoted young people in IT topics.
about.text6: The IT world is constantly evolving, and I keep pace: I continuously engage with new technologies and trends. Currently, I am diving deeper into the world of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to develop innovative solutions and explore the possibilities of this technology.
about.text7: I am particularly passionate about automation: I love identifying repetitive tasks and automating them through intelligent scripts and systems. Whether it's automating IT processes, home automation, or optimizing workflows - I find great joy in developing efficient solutions that save time and reduce errors.
about.text8: I am always committed to developing thoughtful, scalable and user-friendly solutions that solve real problems and make processes more efficient.

faserf.title: The Story Behind FaserF
faserf.text1: As a child, I was called "Faser" by my friends - a funny and humorous nickname that was given to me.
faserf.text2: The trailing "F" stands for my first name Fabian, which is how the name FaserF came about.
faserf.text3: The name then primarily established itself in the gaming scene and thus became a fixed part of my user tag on the internet. Today I use it on GitHub, in projects and in the developer community.
